scripts.bundle:nodejs: wasm-bindgen ../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/aws_kms_adapter_wasm.wasm --typescript --weak-refs --target nodejs --out-dir node && node ../build/node aws_kms_adapter_wasm && tsc --project ./lib/tsconfig.json && node ../build/replace_paths ./lib/tsconfig.json node aws_kms_adapter_wasm
scripts.build:nodejs: npm run build:src && npm run bundle:nodejs && wasm-opt -O node/aws_kms_adapter_wasm_bg.wasm -o node/aws_kms_adapter_wasm_bg.wasm
